query:
-- Total counts
SELECT 
  'Total Manufacturers' as metric,
  COUNT(DISTINCT make) as value
FROM vehicles
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Total Models',
  COUNT(DISTINCT model)
FROM vehicles
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Total Engines',
  COUNT(DISTINCT engine_code)
FROM vehicles
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Total Vehicle Variants',
  COUNT(*)
FROM vehicles;

-- Top 20 manufacturers by vehicle count
SELECT 
  make,
  COUNT(*) as vehicle_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT model) as model_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT engine_code) as engine_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles), 2) as percentage
FROM vehicles
GROUP BY make
ORDER BY vehicle_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Top 20 models by vehicle count
SELECT 
  CONCAT(make, ' ', model) as full_model,
  make,
  model,
  COUNT(*) as variant_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT engine_code) as engine_variants,
  COUNT(DISTINCT year) as year_range,
  MIN(year) as first_year,
  MAX(year) as last_year,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vehicles), 2) as percentage
FROM vehicles
GROUP BY make, model
ORDER BY variant_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
